hero.label: Kleston — Quebec
hero.title: Your specialist in wall protection and architectural safety

intro.label: Who we are
intro.title: One partner for your entire project
intro.text: Kleston supplies, installs and maintains wall protection systems, handrails and certified architectural safety products across Quebec. We serve healthcare, institutional and industrial facilities.

services.label: What we do
services.title: Complete turnkey service
services.subtitle: From supply to maintenance, one point of contact for your entire project.
services.s1_desc: Direct import of CE and ISO 9001 certified products. Guaranteed competitive pricing through direct sourcing. Delivery across Quebec.
services.s2_desc: Installation by qualified technicians, on time. Each installation includes a full compliance check before project handover.
services.s3_desc: Annual maintenance contracts tailored to your equipment. Periodic inspections, adjustments and parts replacement. Extend the lifespan of your installations.
services.s4_desc: Fast response in case of failure. One contact for all your requests, from diagnosis to repair. Guaranteed response times under contract.

produits.label: Our products
produits.title: Four certified product lines
produits.subtitle: Solutions for every environment, from clinic to warehouse.
produits.g1_desc: Handrails in vinyl, stainless steel or wood. Compliant with international standards. 32 colors.
produits.g2_desc: Combined systems for hospitals, long-term care and institutional facilities. Antibacterial.
produits.g3_desc: Protection strips for high-traffic corridors. Certified shock resistance.
produits.g4_desc: Protects wall and column corners. Vinyl on aluminum or 304 stainless steel.

certifications.label: Our certifications
certifications.title: Products meeting the strictest standards
certifications.subtitle: All our products are imported directly from certified manufacturers. Every piece is tested and validated.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: They trust us
testimonials.t1_text: Kleston delivered and installed our handrail systems across 3 floors in under two weeks. Deadlines met, full compliance at building inspection.
testimonials.t2_text: One supplier for our handrails and wall protection. Kleston handled everything from A to Z. Unbeatable pricing and a serious team.
testimonials.t3_text: Kleston's antibacterial systems meet our facility's sanitary requirements exactly. Certified products, clean installation. Highly recommended.

blog.label: Resources
blog.title: Guides and articles
blog.subtitle: Everything you need to know about standards, compliance and installation.
